TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_insuna, title = insuna, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/insuna} }

S.FORM: qutux qutux ryax ga bniq ta nya insuna ru qoyat qu yaba ta Utux Kayal mnbu na squliq ga n-gut cipok insuna nay.
qutux qutux ryax ga bniq ta nya insuna ru qoyat qu yaba ta Utux Kayal mnbu na squliq ga n-gut cipok insuna nay.
S.PHON: qutux qutux rjax ɣa βniq ta nja ins~ɕuna ru qojat qu jaβa ta utux kajal mnβu na s~ɕquliq ɣa n-ɣut ʦ~ʨipok ins~ɕuna naj.
